chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.S- 283 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of MA 878/2025. 3. For hearing of MA 879/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 17.10.2025. Mr. Nazeer Ahmed Kalhoro, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Asghar Ali, Advocate for respondent No.1. Mr. Wali Muhammad Jamari, Assistant A.G, Sindh. = Mr. Asghar Ali Chandio, Counsel for the respondent No.1 is present and files Vakalatnama alongwith a statement which are taken on record. Heard Counsel. After hearing the matter at some length the learned counsel for the petitioner-father seeks withdrawal of this petition as not pressed with directions of this Court to the Executing Court to attempt mediation between the parties as a way forward. Counsel for the respondent No.1 submits that welfare of the child is paramount; however, he accepts mediation subject to acceptance of the same by respondent-mother. The proposal of the petitioner’s counsel is reasonable. In case no referral to mediation is made, the matter will proceed before the competent Court in normal course. Given the above, this petition is disposed of as withdrawn in the above terms alongwith pending applications. JUDGE Tufail
